description: Letter from Musa b. Abi al-Hayy, from Alexandria, to Nahray b. Nissim, Fustat. Around 1060. Regarding shipments of goods, mainly beads, linen, and lead. Mentions trading with al-Andalus. Musa b. Abi al-Hayy doesn’t want to risk sending all the goods and money immediately. It seems that Marduk b. Musa also participated in the writing the letter. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 3, #450) VMR
tags: Nahray B. Nissim, trade, Marduk b. Musa
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית מאלכסנדריה לפוסטאט. מוחזק בכיא פריז.
